tasks.label: Build iOS App (Simulator)
tasks.command: xcodebuild -project calendarWorkOutApp.xcodeproj -scheme calendarWorkOutApp -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -configuration Debug build
tasks.detail: Build the workout app for the iOS Simulator using xcodebuild.

tasks.label: Run iOS Simulator
tasks.detail: Boot and open the standard iOS Simulator.

tasks.label: Install & Launch App in Simulator
tasks.command: xcrun simctl install booted ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/calendarWorkOutApp-*/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/calendarWorkOutApp.app && xcrun simctl launch booted calendarWorkOutApp
tasks.detail: Install and run the newly built app binary on the active simulator.
